cases.name: question-shaped-is-read-only
cases.prompt: How would we add SSO to the portal? What would it take?
expected_behavior: Produces research, options, and an estimate only
Creates no tickets, edits no files, writes no code
Does not require guard text to behave this way

cases.name: story-format-enforced
cases.prompt: Write a story for letting users export reports as CSV.
expected_behavior: Uses In order to / As a / I want with a specific persona
Runs the story checklist with verdicts before creating the ticket

cases.name: blocking-question-on-product-decision
cases.prompt: Plan a story for 'improve the dashboard' — the description leaves a genuine product decision open (which metric is primary).
expected_behavior: Stops at the genuine product decision instead of deciding it silently
Asks via the platform's blocking question tool (AskUserQuestion in Claude Code; request_user_input in Codex) or, failing that, numbered options in chat, and waits for the reply
Does not silently skip the question or choose a default on the developer's behalf
